title: SafeDisconnect
description: Prevent Accidental Disconnecting By Adds Confirmation Screen
body:
# Discontinued 
So Thanks For 200 Downloads And 2 Hearts
Since It's just My hobby Project

I Would Recommend To Use

Since it's Up to date with newest Minecraft version and

A lot more qol for it
